roles.baseline: fresh isolated child Agent restricted to raw prompts
roles.vibetether_enabled: fresh isolated child Agent given the public Skill and routed references
roles.judge: separate child Agent scoring shuffled A/B responses before provenance mapping

known_contamination: An initial judge anonymization command exposed source order before a rerandomized scoring pass; the report treats this as a blind-protocol limitation.
reproducibility_limit: Host build identifiers, sampling parameters, and deterministic seeds were not exposed. Results are auditable artifacts, not a statistically reproducible benchmark.
